message: No active payer profiles are configured.
whyItMatters: Patients must be linked to a payer profile to bill any insurance. Without at least one active payer, only self-pay encounters can be billed.
resolution: Add the payers you bill on the Payers settings page and mark them active.

message: One or more active payers are missing their clearinghouse payer ID.
whyItMatters: The Availity (or equivalent clearinghouse) payer ID is required for routing the claim. A missing ID causes the claim to be rejected by the clearinghouse before reaching the payer.
resolution: Look up the payer in the Availity payer list and set the payer ID for each payer in evidence.

message: One or more active payers are missing a payer type.
whyItMatters: Payer type (Medicaid / Medicare / Commercial) drives downstream billing rules — secondary claim rules, write-off behavior, and eligibility lookups.
resolution: Set the payer type for each payer listed in evidence.

message: Two or more active payer profiles share the same clearinghouse payer ID.
whyItMatters: Duplicate payer IDs cause ambiguity in eligibility and ERA matching, leading to mis-posted payments.
resolution: Consolidate the duplicate payers or correct the payer IDs so each active payer has a unique value.
